name: Pineapple Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15.5 oz.) sliced pineapple (in heavy syrup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place a 9x13 inch pan of hot water on the lower rack in the oven.
3. Set aside 2 tablespoons of brown sugar.
4. In a food processor, combine the remaining sugar with cream cheese. Process for 20 seconds.
5. Add pumpkin, eggs, flour, spice, and vanilla extract. Process for 10 seconds, scraping sides once.
6. Pour batter into an 8-inch springform pan coated with vegetable cooking spray.
7. Bake for 50 minutes without opening the oven door.
8. Turn off the oven.
9. Let stand in the oven for 1 hour.
10. Immediately run a knife around the sides of the pan.
11. Refrigerate cheesecake for 3 hours.
12. Drain pineapple, reserving syrup. Cook the reserved syrup, reserved sugar, and diced pineapple over medium-high heat for 8 minutes, or until thick, without stirring.
13. Just before serving, arrange pineapple on top of cheesecake.
14. Drizzle with glaze. Makes 8 servings
